ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager in charge */,
  "num_machines" INTEGER /* Number of machines in the plant */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the machine is located */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the machine (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., displacement, acceleration, pressure, voltage) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor where the reading was taken */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reading */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuators" (
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the actuator is installed */,
  "actuator_name" TEXT /* Name of the actuator */,
  "actuator_type" TEXT /* Type of the actuator (e.g., displacement, acceleration, pressure, voltage) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the actuator was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the actuator was last calibrated */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the actuator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuators_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuators_actuator_type FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_type") REFERENCES actuator_types ("actuator_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator command */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actuator receiving the command */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the command */,
  "command_value" REAL /* Value of the command */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the command */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Whether the command was acknowledged by the actuator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_commands_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit associated with the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_types" (
  "actuator_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator type */,
  "actuator_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the actuator type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the actuator type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit associated with the actuator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., plant manager, engineer, data analyst) */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the user works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, command) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource accessed (e.g., sensor, actuator, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the alarm was generated */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor where the alarm was generated (if applicable) */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actuator where the alarm was generated (if applicable) */,
  "alarm_date" TEXT /* Date the alarm was generated */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of the alarm (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alarm has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant where the report was generated */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, maintenance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., csv, pdf, txt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value used */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actuator that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value used */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_calibrations_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the plant manager */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant managed by the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started as plant manager */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended as plant manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_managers_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the modification occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was modified */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the modified column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the modified column */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
